33:   pull_request:

36: jobs:

38:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

92: name: Codespell
93: 
94: on:
95:   pull_request:
96:     branches: [main, 'release-*']
97: 
98: jobs:
99:   codespell:
100:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
101:     steps:
102:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
103:       - name: Backup files causing false positives
104:         run: |
105:           find . -name 'pyproject.toml' -exec mv {} {}.bak \;
106:           find . -name 'package-lock.json' -exec mv {} {}.bak \;
107:           find . -name 'package.json' -exec mv {} {}.bak \;
108:       - run: pip install codespell
109:       - run: |
110:           codespell --check-filenames \
111:             --skip=".git,*.pyc,*.svg,*.png,*.jpg,*.gif,*.ico,go.sum" \
112:             --ignore-words-list="fo,nam,te,notin,NotIn" .
113:       - name: Restore files
114:         if: always()
115:         run: |
116:           find . -name '*.bak' -exec sh -c 'mv "$1" "${1%.bak}"' _ {} \;

213: **workflows-approve.yml:**
214: ```yaml
215: name: Approve Workflows
216: 
217: on:
218:   pull_request_target:
219:     types: [labeled, synchronize]
220:     branches: [main, 'release-**']
221: 
222: jobs:
223:   approve:
224:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
225:     if: |
226:       github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ok-to-test' ||
227:       github.event.action == 'synchronize'
228:     steps:
229:       - uses: actions/github-script@v7
230:         with:
231:           script: |
232:             const { owner, repo } = context.repo;
233:             const sha = context.payload.pull_request.head.sha;
234:             
235:             const prs = await github.rest.pulls.list({
236:               owner,
237:               repo,
238:               state: 'all',
239:               creator: context.payload.pull_request.user.login
240:             });
241:             
242:             const isFirstTime = prs.data.length <= 1;
243:             const hasOkToTest = context.payload.pull_request.labels.some(l => l.name === 'ok-to-test');
244:             
245:             if (!isFirstTime || hasOkToTest) {
246:               const runs = await github.rest.actions.listWorkflowRunsForRepo({
247:                 owner,
248:                 repo,
249:                 head_sha: sha,
250:                 status: 'action_required'
251:               });
252:               
253:               for (const run of runs.data.workflow_runs) {
254:                 await github.rest.actions.approveWorkflowRun({
255:                   owner,
256:                   repo,
257:                   run_id: run.id
258:                 });
259:                 core.info(`Approved workflow run ${run.id}`);
260:               }
261:             }
262: ```

941: **tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py:**
942: ```python
943: from collections.abc import Generator
944: from typing import Any
945: 
946: from dify_plugin import Tool
947: from dify_plugin.entities.tool import ToolInvokeMessage
948: 
949: import sys
950: sys.path.insert(0, '/app/agentcube-sdk')
951: from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient
952: 
953: 
954: class AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool(Tool):
955:     def _invoke(self, tool_parameters: dict[str, Any]) -> Generator[ToolInvokeMessage]:
956:         result = self.execute(**tool_parameters)
957:         yield self.create_json_message(result)
958: 
959:     def execute(
960:         self,
961:         router_url: str = None,
962:         workload_manager_url: str = None,
963:         language: str = "python",
964:         code_interpreter_id: str = None,
965:         session_id: str = None,
966:         code: str = None,
967:         command: str = None,
968:         session_reuse: bool = False,
969:         **kwargs
970:     ) -> dict[str, Any]:
971:         result = {
972:             "success": False,
973:             "output": "",
974:             "error": None,
975:             "session_id": None,
976:         }
977:         
978:         effective_session_id = session_id if session_reuse else None
979:         
980:         try:
981:             with CodeInterpreterClient(
982:                 router_url=router_url,
983:                 workload_manager_url=workload_manager_url,
984:                 session_id=effective_session_id,
985:                 code_interpreter_name=code_interpreter_id,
986:             ) as client:
987:                 if code:
988:                     exec_result = client.run_code(code, language=language)
989:                     result["output"] = exec_result.get("stdout", "")
990:                     result["error"] = exec_result.get("stderr", "") if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0 else None
991:                     result["success"] = exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) == 0
992:                 elif command:
993:                     exec_result = client.execute_command(command)
994:                     result["output"] = exec_result.get("stdout", "")
995:                     result["error"] = exec_result.get("stderr", "") if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0 else None
996:                     result["success"] = exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) == 0
997:                 
998:                 result["session_id"] = client.session_id
999:                 
1000:         except Exception as e:
1001:             result["error"] = str(e)
1002:             result["success"] = False
1003:         
1004:         return result
1005: ```

1010: agentcube-sdk>=0.0.10
1011: ```

1035: import os

1038:

1040: from pydantic import BaseModel
1041: import uvicorn
1042: 
1043: sys.path.insert(0, '/app/agentcube')
1044: from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient
1045: from agentcube.exceptions import CommandExecutionError
1046: 
1047: API_KEY = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
1048: API_BASE_URL = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_BASE", "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1")
1049: MODEL_NAME = os.getenv("OPENAI_MODEL", "Qwen/QwQ-32B")
1050: CODEINTERPRETER_NAME = os.getenv("CODEINTERPRETER_NAME", "my-interpreter")
1051: SANDBOX_NAMESPACE = os.getenv("SANDBOX_NAMESPACE", "default")
1052: SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC = int(os.getenv("SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC", "5"))
1053: 
1054: SERVER_HOST = "0.0.0.0"
1055: SERVER_PORT = 8000
1056: SERVER_RELOAD = True
1057: 
1058: from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
1059: from langgraph.prebuilt import create_react_agent
1060: from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, AIMessage
1061: 
1062: 
1063: class SandboxRunner:
1064:     def __init__(self, name: str = "my-interpreter", namespace: str = "default", warmup_sec: int = 5):
1065:         self.name = name
1066:         self.namespace = namespace
1067:         self.warmup_sec = warmup_sec
1068:         self.client: Optional[CodeInterpreterClient] = None
1069:     
1070:     def _ensure_client(self, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str):
1071:         if self.client is None:
1072:             self.client = CodeInterpreterClient(
1073:                 router_url=router_url,
1074:                 workload_manager_url=workload_manager_url,
1075:                 code_interpreter_name=self.name,
1076:             )
1077:     
1078:     def upload_file(self, local_path: str, remote_path: str, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str) -> bool:
1079:         self._ensure_client(router_url, workload_manager_url)
1080:         try:
1081:             self.client.upload_file(local_path, remote_path)
1082:             return True
1083:         except Exception as e:
1084:             print(f"Upload failed: {e}")
1085:             return False
1086:     
1087:     def upload_bytes(self, data: bytes, remote_path: str, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str) -> bool:
1088:         self._ensure_client(router_url, workload_manager_url)
1089:         try:
1090:             self.client.write_file(remote_path, data.decode('utf-8', errors='replace'))
1091:             return True
1092:         except Exception as e:
1093:             print(f"Upload bytes failed: {e}")
1094:             return False
1095:     
1096:     def run(self, command: str, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1097:         self._ensure_client(router_url, workload_manager_url)
1098:         try:
1099:             result = self.client.execute_command(command)
1100:             return {
1101:                 "stdout": result.get("stdout", ""),
1102:                 "stderr": result.get("stderr", ""),
1103:                 "exit_code": result.get("exit_code", 0),
1104:             }
1105:         except CommandExecutionError as e:
1106:             return {
1107:                 "stdout": "",
1108:                 "stderr": str(e),
1109:                 "exit_code": e.exit_code,
1110:             }
1111:     
1112:     def stop(self):
1113:         if self.client:
1114:             self.client.stop()
1115:             self.client = None
1116: 
1117: 
1118: def build_react_agent(llm, system_prompt: str):
1119:     return create_react_agent(llm, [], state_modifier=system_prompt)
1120: 
1121: 
1122: def invoke_react_agent(agent, user_text: str) -> str:
1123:     result = agent.invoke({"messages": [HumanMessage(content=user_text)]})
1124:     messages = result.get("messages", [])
1125:     for msg in reversed(messages):
1126:         if isinstance(msg, AIMessage):
1127:             return msg.content
1128:     return ""
1129: 
1130: 
1131: def build_planner_agent(llm):
1132:     return build_react_agent(
1133:         llm,
1134:         "You are a network security expert. Given a PCAP file, write Python scripts using scapy to analyze it."
1135:     )
1136: 
1137: 
1138: def build_reporter_agent(llm):
1139:     return build_react_agent(
1140:         llm,
1141:         "You are a security analyst. Given execution results from PCAP analysis tools, write a comprehensive security report."
1142:     )
1143: 
1144: 
1145: class AnalyzeResponse(BaseModel):
1146:     script: str
1147:     results: List[Dict[str, Any]]
1148:     report: str
1149: 
1150: 
1151: PLANNER = None
1152: REPORTER = None
1153: ROUTER_URL = os.getenv("ROUTER_URL", "")
1154: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL = os.getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL", "")
1155: 
1156: 
1157: def on_startup():
1158:     global PLANNER, REPORTER
1159:     if not API_KEY:
1160:         raise RuntimeError("OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is required")
1161:     
1162:     llm = ChatOpenAI(
1163:         api_key=API_KEY,
1164:         base_url=API_BASE_URL,
1165:         model=MODEL_NAME,
1166:     )
1167:     PLANNER = build_planner_agent(llm)
1168:     REPORTER = build_reporter_agent(llm)
1169:     print("Startup complete: LLM agents initialized")
1170: 
1171: 
1172: app = FastAPI(
1173:     title="PCAP Analyzer",
1174:     on_startup=[on_startup],
1175: )
1176: 
1177: 
1178: @app.post("/analyze", response_model=AnalyzeResponse)
1179: async def analyze_endpoint(
1180:     pcap_file: Optional[UploadFile] = File(None),
1181:     pcap_path: Optional[str] = Form(None),
1182: ):
1183:     if not pcap_file and not pcap_path:
1184:         raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Either pcap_file or pcap_path is required")
1185:     
1186:     runner = SandboxRunner(
1187:         name=CODEINTERPRETER_NAME,
1188:         namespace=SANDBOX_NAMESPACE,
1189:         warmup_sec=SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC,
1190:     )
1191:     
1192:     try:
1193:         if pcap_file:
1194:             pcap_bytes = await pcap_file.read()
1195:             remote_pcap = f"/tmp/{pcap_file.filename}"
1196:             runner.upload_bytes(pcap_bytes, remote_pcap, ROUTER_URL, WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL)
1197:             local_pcap = remote_pcap
1198:         else:
1199:             local_pcap = pcap_path
1200:         
1201:         script = invoke_react_agent(PLANNER, f"Analyze PCAP file at {local_pcap}")
1202:         
1203:         results = []
1204:         exec_result = runner.run(f"python3 -c '{script}'", ROUTER_URL, WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL)
1205:         results.append(exec_result)
1206:         
1207:         if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0:
1208:             repaired = invoke_react_agent(
1209:                 PLANNER,
1210:                 f"Previous script failed with error: {exec_result.get('stderr')}. Fix it."
1211:             )
1212:             exec_result = runner.run(f"python3 -c '{repaired}'", ROUTER_URL, WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL)
1213:             results.append(exec_result)
1214:             script = repaired
1215:         
1216:         report = invoke_react_agent(REPORTER, f"Write a report based on: {results}")
1217:         
1218:         return AnalyzeResponse(script=script, results=results, report=report)
1219:     
1220:     finally:
1221:         runner.stop()
1222: 
1223: 
1224: if __name__ == "__main__":
1225:     uvicorn.run(app, host=SERVER_HOST, port=SERVER_PORT, reload=SERVER_RELOAD)
1226: ```

1998: # AgentCube
1999: 
2000: AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.

2002: ## Overview
2003: 
2004: AgentCube provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).
2005: 
2006: ## Features
2007: 
2008: - **Sandbox Orchestration**: Kubernetes CRDs for AgentRuntime and CodeInterpreter
2009: - **Session Routing**: HTTP proxy with JWT authentication
2010: - **Idle Cleanup**: Automatic cleanup of inactive sandboxes
2011: - **Python SDK**: Easy-to-use client library
2012: - **CLI Toolkit**: Developer-friendly command-line interface
2013: 
2014: ## Quick Start
2015: 
2016: ### Prerequisites
2017: 
2018: - Kubernetes 1.28+
2019: - Helm 3.x
2020: - Redis/Valkey

2039: ) as client:
2040:     result = client.run_code("print('Hello, AgentCube!')")
2041:     print(result["stdout"])
2042: ```

name: Codegen Check

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, 'release-*']

jobs:
  codegen-check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            codegen:
              - 'pkg/apis/**'
              - 'hack/**'
              - '.github/workflows/**'
              - 'Makefile'
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        if: steps.filter.outputs.codegen == 'true'

apiVersion: v1
name: agentcube
description: A Helm chart for AgentCube
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

imagePullSecrets: []
nameOverride: ""
fullnameOverride: ""

redis:
  addr: ""
  password: ""

router:
  replicas: 1
  image:
    repository: ghcr.io/volcano-sh/agentcube-router
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    tag: latest
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
  config: {}
  extraEnv: []
  serviceAccountName: ""
  rbac:
    create: false

workloadmanager:
  replicas: 1
  image:
    repository: ghcr.io/volcano-sh/workloadmanager
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    tag: latest
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 8080
  resources:
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
  extraEnv: []

volcano:
  scheduler:
    enabled: false
    replicas: 1
    image:
      repository: ghcr.io/volcano-sh/vc-agent-scheduler
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
      tag: latest

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    app: workloadmanager
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: workloadmanager
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: workloadmanager
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: workloadmanager
      {{- with .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: workloadmanager
          image: "{{ .Values.workloadmanager.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.workloadmanager.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            - name: REDIS_ADDR
              value: {{ .Values.redis.addr }}
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              value: {{ .Values.redis.password }}
            {{- with .Values.workloadmanager.extraEnv }}
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
            {{- end }}
          args:
            - --port={{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
            - --runtime-class-name=
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.workloadmanager.resources | nindent 12 }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app: workloadmanager

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    app: agentcube-router
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.router.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: agentcube-router
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: agentcube-router
    spec:
      {{- if .Values.router.serviceAccountName }}
      serviceAccountName: {{ .Values.router.serviceAccountName }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: agentcube-router
          image: "{{ .Values.router.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.router.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.router.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            - name: REDIS_ADDR
              value: {{ .Values.redis.addr }}
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              value: {{ .Values.redis.password }}
            - name: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL
              value: "http://workloadmanager.{{ .Release.Namespace }}.svc.cluster.local:{{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}"
            {{- with .Values.router.extraEnv }}
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
            {{- end }}
          args:
            - --port={{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            - --debug
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.router.resources | nindent 12 }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 1
            periodSeconds: 2
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 1
            periodSeconds: 2
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.router.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.router.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app: agentcube-router

apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
rules:
  - apiGroups: ["agents.x-k8s.io"]
    resources: ["sandboxes"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["extensions.agents.x-k8s.io"]
    resources: ["sandboxclaims", "sandboxtemplates", "sandboxwarmpools", "sandboxwarmpools/status"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh"]
    resources: ["codeinterpreters", "codeinterpreters/status", "codeinterpreters/finalizers", "agentruntimes", "agentruntimes/status"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods", "secrets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["authentication.k8s.io"]
    resources: ["tokenreviews"]
    verbs: ["create"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: workloadmanager
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: workloadmanager
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

{{- if .Values.volcano.scheduler.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: volcano-agent-scheduler
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    app: volcano-agent-scheduler
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: volcano-agent-scheduler
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: volcano-agent-scheduler
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: scheduler
          image: "{{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
{{- end }}

# Build stage
FROM golang:1.24.9-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

RUN apk add --no-cache git

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

COPY cmd/ pkg/ ./
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build \
    CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH:-amd64} \
    go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o workloadmanager ./cmd/workload-manager

# Runtime stage
FROM alpine:3.19

RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /workspace/workloadmanager .

RUN adduser -D -u 1000 apiserver

USER apiserver

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["/app/workloadmanager"]

CMD ["--port=8080"]

# Build stage
FROM golang:1.24.9-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

RUN apk add --no-cache git

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

COPY cmd/ pkg/ client-go/ ./
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build \
    CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH:-amd64} \
    go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o agentcube-router ./cmd/router

# Runtime stage
FROM alpine:3.19

RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /workspace/agentcube-router .

RUN adduser -D -u 1000 router

USER router

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["/app/agentcube-router"]

CMD ["--port=8080", "--debug"]

# Build stage
FROM golang:1.24.4 AS builder

WORKDIR /app

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o picod ./cmd/picod

# Runtime stage
FROM ubuntu:24.04

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /root/

COPY --from=builder /app/picod .

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["./picod"]

from collections.abc import Generator
from typing import Any

from dify_plugin import Tool
from dify_plugin.entities.tool import ToolInvokeMessage

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app/agentcube-sdk')
from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient


class AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool(Tool):
    def _invoke(self, tool_parameters: dict[str, Any]) -> Generator[ToolInvokeMessage]:
        result = self.execute(**tool_parameters)
        yield self.create_json_message(result)

    def execute(
        self,
        router_url: str = None,
        workload_manager_url: str = None,
        language: str = "python",
        code_interpreter_id: str = None,
        session_id: str = None,
        code: str = None,
        command: str = None,
        session_reuse: bool = False,
        **kwargs
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        result = {
            "success": False,
            "output": "",
            "error": None,
            "session_id": None,
        }
        
        effective_session_id = session_id if session_reuse else None
        
        try:
            with CodeInterpreterClient(
                router_url=router_url,
                workload_manager_url=workload_manager_url,
                session_id=effective_session_id,
                code_interpreter_name=code_interpreter_id,
            ) as client:
                if code:
                    exec_result = client.run_code(code, language=language)
                    result["output"] = exec_result.get("stdout", "")
                    result["error"] = exec_result.get("stderr", "") if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0 else None
                    result["success"] = exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) == 0
                elif command:
                    exec_result = client.execute_command(command)
                    result["output"] = exec_result.get("stdout", "")
                    result["error"] = exec_result.get("stderr", "") if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0 else None
                    result["success"] = exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) == 0
                
                result["session_id"] = client.session_id
                
        except Exception as e:
            result["error"] = str(e)
            result["success"] = False
        
        return result
